pattern: Choosing each value 1..n as the root and combining every left-subtree shape with every right-subtree shape enumerates all structurally unique BSTs by recursion.
hints: Fix a root value i; the smaller values must form its left subtree and the larger ones its right subtree, independently.
Recurse on each contiguous range lo..hi: for every root in that range, build all left shapes from lo..root-1 and all right shapes from root+1..hi.
Take the cartesian product of left and right shape lists for each chosen root, and the empty range contributes a single null subtree.

edge_inputs.description: smallest input: a single tree of one node

stress.description: every value of n in range, exercising the full Catalan growth
stress.note: n is tiny by constraint; the work is exponential in the number of trees
